name: Suntory Beverage & Food Limited
description: Suntory Beverage & Food Limited is a leading global beverage company headquartered in Japan, operating in approximately 70 countries and regions. Guided by the purpose to inspire the brilliance of life in harmony with nature, the company delivers a diverse portfolio of non-alcoholic beverages and food products. Its iconic brands, such as Suntory Tennensui, BOSS, Iyemon, Oasis, and Lucozade, are deeply rooted in the daily lives of consumers worldwide. The company emphasizes sustainability, integrating environmental stewardship and resource circulation into its core business strategy to create lasting value for society and consumers alike.
